English
A Composition (100) For Aminopeptide Based Hair Care Complex Is Disclosed. The Composition Includes 15 To 18 Percentage By Weight Of
Hair Proteins (110), 5 To 10 Percentage By Weight Of An Arginine (120), 5 To 8 Percentage By Weight Of A Lactic Acid (130), 2 To 3
Percentage By Weight Of A Ceramide (140), 5 To 6 Percentage By Weight Of A Sea Kale (150), 3 To 7 Percentage By Weight Of A
Oligopeptide (160), 9 To 10 Percentage By Weight Of A Sodium Pyrrolidone Carboxylic Acid (170), 5 To 7 Percentage By Weight Of A
Panthenol (180) And 30 To 45 Percentage By Weight Of Stabilizers (190). Fig. 1
